prompt: A wide landscape-oriented ornate bronze plaque. The plaque has a unique "stepped" shape, wider at the top and slightly narrower at the bottom, just like a fantasy shield or crest. In the center are two large, detailed stag beetles in a fighting pose with mandibles locked. The background is dark volcanic rock with glowing red magma veins. The frame is heavy, weathered bronze with blue and yellow glowing gems. ABSOLUTELY NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO WORDS. Dark fantasy, epic cinematic style. Solid black background for easy removal.
